raw_consumer_statement: I had a dispute come across my card on XX/XX/2023 for a total of XXXX at a XXXX that I did not make and I promptly reported it to the credit card company in hopes to get this issue resolved in a timely manner but that is far from what has happened. It is now XXXX  months later and nothing has been told to me about anything with this and I want to be able to have that credit back in order to pay bills. I feel as I am at a disjustice as I am being penalized for a stolen card that was properly closed and reported immediately.
